---
pagetitle: "Projects · David A. Marinelarena"
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-style: none
section-divs: false
listing:
  - id: projects-list
    contents: ["*/index.qmd"]
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, categories, date]
    image-height: 200px
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

::: {.section-label}
// projects
:::

```{=html}
<p class="page-lede">Portfolio of pipelines, tutorials, and analyses.</p>
```

::: {#projects-list}
:::
